config.script:
try:
		data=self.view.params.rowData
		for i in data:
			SerialNumber = data["SerialNumber"]
			AreaName = data["AreaName"]
			LineName = data["LineName"]
			WorkStationName = data["WorkStationName"]
			OrderNumber = data["OrderNumber"]
			BOM=data["M_BOM_Id"]
			AreaId=data["MST_Area_Id"]
			LineId=data["MST_Line_Id"]
			WorkStationId=data["MST_WorkStation_Id"]
		User=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		ShiftId=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Shift/getMST_Shift_Id",{'Line':int(LineId)})
		if self.props.text == 'Start':
			params={'SerialNumber':str(SerialNumber),'WorkStation':self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId,'Line':int(LineId),'Area':int(AreaId),'Event':int(3),
			'M_BOM_Id':int(BOM),'Status':int(1),'OrderNumber':str(OrderNumber),'Shift':int(ShiftId),'UserId':User}
			result=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Rework/insertReworkEvent",params)
			system.perspective.print(params)
			self.props.text = 'Complete'
		elif self.props.text == 'Complete':
			system.perspective.openPopup("Reworkpopup", "Project_VECV/Rework/ReworkPopup",params = {'SerialNumber':str(SerialNumber),'Area':str(AreaName),'Line':str(LineName),'Station':str(WorkStationName),
			'BOM':int(BOM),'AreaId':int(AreaId),'LineId':int(LineId),'OrderNumber':str(OrderNumber)},modal = True)
		else:
			pass
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print(str(e))
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print(lineNumber)
		system.perspective.print(description)
